## Supervisor guidance for evolution

Two axes: subtlety (plausibly-justified redundancy) and tool-environment realism (cohort tool surface); one mutation operator per lineage variant for attributable Elo lift; preserve sub-mode labels and parent-id provenance.

Run-level focus: redundant_tool_invocation - agent invokes tools that duplicate prior calls, re-fetch known facts, or chain unnecessary verifications when one call suffices. Meta-review priors: 5 existing survivors (Elo 941/1000/1060)...
